creator: dannyniu@hotmail.com
text:
(In reply to Conrad Meyer from comment #7)

Actually, one have to set each account's locale individually, as described in https://unix.stackexchange.com/a/484932/186590. 

When I ``su -'' to root from my daily user account and enter the same Chinese characters, the shell exits. But in my daily account, where login class had been modified, no issue anymore.
